title: Change appearance of due date on Timeline
excerpt:
Currently the dates set in the timeline column and the due date look exactly the same in the timeline overview. 
It would be helpful to have the timeline look different (a diamond?) to make it stand out.

posts.author: Joris (Joris Nieuwint)
posts.cookedHtml:
Currently the dates set in the timeline column and the due date look exactly the same in the timeline overview.

It would be helpful to have the timeline look different (a diamond?) to make it stand out.

posts.author: straister (Shelly Traister)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes please! OR BETTER yet, let us deselect the fact that it shows both in the timeline view!

posts.author: JohnW (John Waller)
posts.cookedHtml:
straister:

let us deselect the fact that it shows both in the timeline view!

Do you use the Timeline settings where you can select which Date columns appear in the Timeline?

posts.author: straister (Shelly Traister)
posts.cookedHtml: I had tried that before, and it didn’t work for me, but after your question, I tried again and it did work! So this part of the issue, is no longer a problem, thanks John!
